name: products.php wizard 3-стъпков (with variations)
action_steps: Стъпка 1: име, цена, размери (S, M, L, XL)
expected_result: 4 child артикула (по 1 за размер) в products
smoke_sql: SELECT parent_id, COUNT(*) AS variations FROM products WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY parent_id LIMIT 5
